This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] invoking (as show-picker) on dialog does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as show-picker) on open dialog does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
[FAIL] invoking (as show-picker) on open modal dialog does nothing
  assert_false: command event fired expected false got true
Harness: the test ran to completion.
